text: # Student Pass Application Requirements ## First-Time Applications 1. **Passport size photos** on a white background (Taken within the last six months) 2. **Copy of both bio data and a valid visa/stamp page from your passport** 3. **Copy of your basic academic transcripts and A/O level certificates** 4. **Equation of the basic academic certificates into the Kenyan system** - Visit: https://qa.knqa.go.ke/ 5.

**Commitment letter from parent/guardian** addressed to: The Director of Immigrations P.O. Box 30191‐00100 Nairobi *Note: In the letter request for a student pass* 6. **Copy of parents'/guardians ID or passport** 7. **For self-sponsored students**, a certified copy of your Bank Statements is required 8. **Police clearance certificate/certificate of good conduct** from country of origin 9.

**Proof of in-patient medical insurance** or a proof of purchase for the same **Important**: To submit a request for the student pass, please use the following link: https://siso.strathmore.edu/ All documents must be valid at the time of submission. --- ## Renewals 1. **Passport size photos** on a white background (Taken within the last six months) 2. **Copy of both bio data and a valid visa/stamp page from your passport** 3.

**Copy of your basic academic transcripts and A/O level certificates** 4. **Progress Reports/certificates** so far obtained from the university or initial institution 5. **Equation of the basic academic certificates into the Kenyan system** - Visit: https://qa.knqa.go.ke/ 6. **Commitment letter from parent/guardian** addressed to: The Director of Immigrations P.O. Box 30191‐00100 Nairobi *Note: In the letter, the parent/Guardian should request for a student pass on your behalf* 7.

**Copy of parent's/guardians ID or passport** 8. **For self-sponsored students**, a certified copy of your Bank Statements is required 9. **Police clearance certificate locally acquired** - From DCI Headquarters, Kiambuu Road, Opp Karura Forest 10. **Proof of in-patient medical insurance** or a proof of purchase for the same **Important**: To submit a request for the student pass, please use the following link: https://siso.strathmore.edu/ All documents must be valid at the time of submission.
